repo_signals: L3 smoke for platform.helm: chart templates values _helpers structure, values overriding precedence, helm upgrade rollback release history, helm template debugging, subcharts dependencies, hooks, schema validation

retrieval_query: helm chart values precedence templates helpers upgrade rollback release history helm template subchart dependency hook schema validation

validation_smoke.name: platform.helm L3 validation smoke
signals: helm template renders the chart with no errors and the diff against the live release shows only intended changes
helm lint and a values.schema.json validation pass for both default and override value sets
helm upgrade --atomic completes and helm history shows a new superseded->deployed revision
helm rollback restores the prior revision and the workload returns to a healthy ready state

diagnosis_smoke.name: platform.helm diagnosis smoke
signals: A template render error traced to a nil pointer on a missing values key rather than a Kubernetes API problem
An override silently ignored because a parent set the same key at higher precedence than the values file
A subchart value not applied because it was not nested under the subchart's alias in the parent values
A failed upgrade left a pending-upgrade release because a pre-upgrade hook job never completed
Indentation/whitespace bug from missing nindent or a stray range producing invalid YAML
